description: Predefined end-to-end test cases for the Qanary minimal Python example. Every question is answerable from the local Wikidata subset (Wikidata-dataset/wikidata-subset.ttl, built around 'Hawaiian pizza' / wd:Q590076), so the expected facts appear deterministically in the answer the pipeline stores — no public Wikidata Query Service needed. Each case sends the question through the LD-Java -> NEL -> QB -> QE pipeline and asserts that every string in 'expected_contains' is present in the stored JSON answer.

cases.name: inventor-of-hawaiian-pizza
cases.question: Who is the inventor of the Hawaiian Pizza?

cases.name: origin-of-hawaiian-pizza
cases.question: Where does the Hawaiian pizza come from?

cases.name: ingredients-of-hawaiian-pizza
cases.question: What is the Hawaiian pizza made from?
